# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { createClient } from '@vercel/edge-config';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

interface EdgeConfigValues {
  api_key: string;
  db_url: string;
  feature_flags: {
    enable_new_dashboard: boolean;
    enable_beta_features: boolean;
    enable_dark_mode: boolean;
    maintenance_mode: boolean;
  };
  rate_limit: number;
  cache_ttl: number;
  allowed_origins: string[];
}

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: EdgeConfigValues = {
  api_key: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  db_url: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  feature_flags: {
    enable_new_dashboard: false,
    enable_beta_features: false,
    enable_dark_mode: true,
    maintenance_mode: false,
  },
  rate_limit: 100,
  cache_ttl: 3600,
  allowed_origins: ['https://example.com', 'https://app.example.com'],
};

async function getEdgeConfig(): Promise<EdgeConfigValues> {
  const connectionString = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!connectionString) {
    console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG environment variable not set. Using default configuration.');
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }

  try {
    const edgeConfigClient = createClient(connectionString);

    const [apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags, rateLimit, cacheTtl, allowedOrigins] =
      await Promise.all([
        edgeConfigClient.get<string>('api_key'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<string>('db_url'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<EdgeConfigValues['feature_flags']>('feature_flags'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<number>('rate_limit'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<number>('cache_ttl'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<string[]>('allowed_origins'),
      ]);

    return {
      api_key: apiKey ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.api_key,
      db_url: dbUrl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.db_url,
      feature_flags: featureFlags
        ? { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.feature_flags, ...featureFlags }
        : DEFAULT_CONFIG.feature_flags,
      rate_limit: rateLimit ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.rate_limit,
      cache_ttl: cacheTtl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.cache_ttl,
      allowed_origins: allowedOrigins ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.allowed_origins,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to read from Edge Config:', error);
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }
}

function checkFeatureAccess(
  featureFlags: EdgeConfigValues['feature_flags'],
  feature: string
): boolean {
  const flagKey = feature as keyof EdgeConfigValues['feature_flags'];
  return featureFlags[flagKey] ?? false;
}

function isOriginAllowed(origin: string | null, allowedOrigins: string[]): boolean {
  if (!origin) return false;
  return allowedOrigins.includes(origin);
}

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const startTime = Date.now();
  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const pathname = url.pathname;
  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');

  const appConfig = await getEdgeConfig();

  const corsHeaders: Record<string, string> = {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    'X-Config-Load-Time': `${Date.now() - startTime}ms`,
  };

  if (origin && isOriginAllowed(origin, appConfig.allowed_origins)) {
    corsHeaders['Access-Control-Allow-Origin'] = origin;
    corsHeaders['Access-Control-Allow-Methods'] = 'GET, POST, OPTIONS';
    corsHeaders['Access-Control-Allow-Headers'] = 'Content-Type, Authorization';
  }

  if (request.method === 'OPTIONS') {
    return new Response(null, { status: 204, headers: corsHeaders });
  }

  if (appConfig.feature_flags.maintenance_mode && pathname !== '/api/config/health') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: 'Service Unavailable',
        message: 'The service is currently undergoing maintenance. Please try again later.',
      }),
      { status: 503, headers: corsHeaders }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === '/api/config' || pathname === '/') {
    const apiKeyProvided = request.headers.get('x-api-key');

    const sanitizedConfig = {
      api_key_configured: !!appConfig.api_key && appConfig.api_key !== DEFAULT_CONFIG.api_key,
      api_key_preview: appConfig.api_key
        ? `${appConfig.api_key.substring(0, 10)}...${appConfig.api_key.substring(appConfig.api_key.length - 4)}`
        : 'not set',
      db_url_configured: !!appConfig.db_url && appConfig.db_url !== DEFAULT_CONFIG.db_url,
      db_url_host: (() => {
        try {
          const dbUrl = new URL(appConfig.db_url);
          return dbUrl.hostname;
        } catch {
          return 'invalid_url';
        }
      })(),
      feature_flags: appConfig.feature_flags,
      rate_limit: appConfig.rate_limit,
      cache_ttl: appConfig.cache_ttl,
      allowed_origins: appConfig.allowed_origins,
      authenticated: apiKeyProvided === appConfig.api_key,
      using_defaults: !process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
      load_time_ms: Date.now() - startTime,
    };

    return new Response(JSON.stringify(sanitizedConfig, null, 2), {
      status: 200,
      headers: corsHeaders,
    });
  }

  if (pathname === '/api/config/features') {
    const featureName = url.searchParams.get('name');

    if (featureName) {
      const isEnabled = checkFeatureAccess(appConfig.feature_flags, featureName);
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          feature: featureName,
          enabled: isEnabled,
        }),
        { status: 200, headers: corsHeaders }
      );
    }

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        feature_flags: appConfig.feature_flags,
        total_flags: Object.keys(appConfig.feature_flags).length,
        enabled_count: Object.values(appConfig.feature_flags).filter(Boolean).length,
      }),
      { status: 200, headers: corsHeaders }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === '/api/config/health') {
    const edgeConfigConnected = !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

    let edgeConfigReadable = false;
    if (edgeConfigConnected) {
      try {
        const client = createClient(process.env.EDGE_CONFIG!);
        await client.get('api_key');
        edgeConfigReadable = true;
      } catch {
        edgeConfigReadable = false;
      }
    }

    const health = {
      status: 'ok',
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      edge_config: {
        connected: edgeConfigConnected,
        readable: edgeConfigReadable,
        connection_string_set: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
      },
      defaults_active: !edgeConfigConnected,
      config_loaded: true,
      response_time_ms: Date.now() - startTime,
      maintenance_mode: appConfig.feature_flags.maintenance_mode,
    };

    return new Response(JSON.stringify(health, null, 2), {
      status: 200,
      headers: corsHeaders,
    });
  }

  if (pathname === '/api/config/validate') {
    const apiKeyProvided = request.headers.get('x-api-key') || request.headers.get('authorization')?.replace('Bearer ', '');

    if (!apiKeyProvided) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          valid: false,
          error: 'No API key provided. Include x-api-key header or Authorization: Bearer <key>',
        }),
        { status: 401, headers: corsHeaders }
      );
    }

    const isValid = apiKeyProvided === appConfig.api_key;

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        valid: isValid,
        message: isValid ? 'API key is valid' : 'Invalid API key',
      }),
      { status: isValid ? 200 : 403, headers: corsHeaders }
    );
  }

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      error: 'Not Found',
      message: `Route ${pathname} not found`,
      available_routes: [
        'GET /api/config - View current configuration (sanitized)',
        'GET /api/config/features - List all feature flags',
        'GET /api/config/features?name=<flag> - Check specific feature flag',
        'GET /api/config/health - Health check and Edge Config status',
        'GET /api/config/validate - Validate API key (requires x-api-key header)',
      ],
    }),
    { status: 404, headers: corsHeaders }
  );
}
